untranslatable_reason: Signal requires z-score adjusted buy price calculation based on 90-day standard deviation of close-to-close returns and gap ranking by magnitude. The allowed indicators do not include: (1) a custom z-score adjusted price indicator that combines previous day's low with 1 * 90-day volatility; (2) ranking/sorting capability to select top N stocks by gap magnitude. These require dynamic calculation of 90-day rolling std dev of returns and cross-asset ranking logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The core gap-down reversion logic (open < prev_low AND open > sma_20) is translatable, but the signal's sophisticated entry mechanism (z-score adjusted threshold AND top-10 ranking by gap size) cannot be fully expressed. Would require: hvol_20 or hvol_100 for volatility proxy (but not 90-day), and a custom ranking engine outside indicator scope. The intraday exit (same-day close) is represented as a market-on-close logic.
